category_sources: Official project homepage says Git-hooks is a hook manager and explains hook scopes and usage.
source_facts.description says it is a Git hooks manager.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub README heading is git-hooks.
source_facts.name is git-hooks-go, the Homebrew formula name used to avoid naming conflict.
docs_sources: Official GitHub Pages site is a dedicated documentation surface and the README points to the project wiki for more information.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already has https://github.com/git-hooks/git-hooks, so repo is returned as null per instruction.
tags_sources: Official GitHub topics include git and hook-manager.
